fields.label: Item Description
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sItemDescription FROM tblInventory ORDER BY sItemDescription
fields.notes: Parts/supplies inventory — NOT scope instruments (those are in tblScope)

fields.label: Current Stock Level
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 nLevelCurrent FROM tblInventory ORDER BY sItemDescription

fields.label: Min Level
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 nLevelMinimum FROM tblInventory ORDER BY sItemDescription

fields.label: Max Level
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 nLevelMaximum FROM tblInventory ORDER BY sItemDescription

fields.label: Active
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bActive, 0) AS bActive FROM tblInventory ORDER BY sItemDescription

fields.label: Low Stock Count
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblInventory WHERE ISNULL(nLevelCurrent, 0) <= ISNULL(nLevelMinimum, 0) AND ISNULL(bActive, 0) = 1
fields.notes: Count of active items at or below minimum level
